era: Seattle. Noise Rock. E=7 -- self-released, DIY, the underground endpoint of the 249-252 batch.

theory_nodes.concept: 249-252 Seattle rock spectrum: Sub Pop blues (249), Hollywood blues (250), Sub Pop garage (251), Self-released noise rock (252). Institutional gradient from most commercially visible to most independent. E=7 across all four. The batch maps the full width of current Seattle rock.
theory_nodes.description: 249-252 as institutional spectrum of Seattle rock.

theory_nodes.concept: Noise rock tradition: No Wave (1970s NYC) → SST Records (Black Flag, Sonic Youth) → Touch and Go (Big Black, Shellac, Steve Albini) → 1990s underground (Unwound, Jesus Lizard) → current DIY practitioners. Self-released. Volume as composition, feedback as instrument, structural disruption as content, dissonance as primary harmonic material.
theory_nodes.description: Noise rock lineage and aesthetic principles.

theory_nodes.concept: E=7 streak: four consecutive degrees (249, 250, 251, 252) at E=7. The current Seattle rock generation's energy level. Holds across blues rock, garage rock, and noise rock; across Sub Pop, Hollywood, and self-release. The batch closes the streak at degree 252.

cross_references.relationship: Sub Pop vs. self-released. The institutional contrast within the blues-rock-noise rock batch.
Sub Pop garage vs. self-released noise. Adjacent traditions, adjacent degrees, opposite institutional positions.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7 vs E=4. Noise rock's abrasive textures against the rhythmic percussion of stone-on-stone tidal surge. Force against hard material: guitar pick vs. string; wave vs. stone.

milestones: E=7 STREAK CLOSES (249-252, four consecutive degrees)

noise_lineage.no_wave: New York, late 1970s -- DNA, Teenage Jesus and the Jerks. Abrasion, out-of-tune instruments, structural rejection.
noise_lineage.sst_records: Los Angeles, 1978-1995 -- Black Flag, Sonic Youth. American hardcore and noise rock.
noise_lineage.touch_and_go: Chicago, 1981-2009 -- Big Black, Shellac. Steve Albini production ethic.
noise_lineage.pnw_connection: Olympia DIY scene -- K Records, Kill Rock Stars, Unwound. 60 miles south of Seattle.
